title: [Arc][Dedup] Crash on updating nested calls
body:
Reduced test case:
Note that the crash does not always happen, but depends on the order in which the arcs are processed which is not entirely deterministic because they are sorted by hash.

```mlir
arc.define @Queue_arc_5_split_0(%arg0: i4, %arg1: i1) -> i4 {
  %c0_i4 = hw.constant 0 : i4
  arc.output %c0_i4 : i4
}
arc.define @Queue_arc_5_split_4_0(%arg0: i4, %arg1: i1) -> i4 {
  %0 = arc.call @Queue_arc_5_split_0(%arg0, %arg1) : (i4, i1) -> i4
  arc.output %0 : i4
}
arc.define @TLMonitor_arc_2_12(%arg0: i1, %arg1: i4, %arg2: i4, %arg3: i1) -> i4 {
  %0 = arc.call @Queue_arc_5_split_4_0(%arg2, %arg3) : (i4, i1) -> i4
  arc.output %0 : i4
}
arc.define @TLMonitor_arc_2_13(%arg0: i1, %arg1: i4, %arg2: i4, %arg3: i1) -> i4 {
  %0 = arc.call @Queue_arc_5_split_4_0(%arg2, %arg3) : (i4, i1) -> i4
  arc.output %0 : i4
}
arc.define @Queue_arc_5_split_4_1(%arg0: i4, %arg1: i1) -> i4 {
  %0 = arc.call @Queue_arc_5_split_0(%arg0, %arg1) : (i4, i1) -> i4
  arc.output %0 : i4
}
```

Dedup crashes in the `addCallSiteOperands` function with the following stack trace:

```
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: build/bin/circt-opt --arc-dedup dedup-test-reduced.mlir --debug-only=arc-dedup

#37 0x00007f408a651d90 __libc_start_call_main ./csu/../sysdeps/nptl/libc_start_call_main.h:58:16
#38 0x00007f408a651e40 call_init ./csu/../csu/libc-start.c:128:20
#39 0x00007f408a651e40 __libc_start_main ./csu/../csu/libc-start.c:379:5
#40 0x000055d6d1729405 _start (build/bin/circt-opt+0xea405)
```

The debug output of Dedup is the following (before it crashes). The crash only happens when the arcs are processed in this order, when the `Queue...` arcs are processed first, it works fine.

```
Check for exact merges (5 arcs)
Check for constant-agnostic merges (5 arcs)
- Outlining 2 operands from "TLMonitor_arc_2_12"
  - Operand #1 of %0 = arc.call @Queue_arc_5_split_4_0(%arg2, %arg3) : (i4, i1) -> i4
  - Operand #0 of %0 = arc.call @Queue_arc_5_split_4_0(%arg2, %arg3) : (i4, i1) -> i4
  - Candidate "TLMonitor_arc_2_13"
  - Merged "TLMonitor_arc_2_12" <- "TLMonitor_arc_2_13"
- Outlining 2 operands from "Queue_arc_5_split_4_0"
  - Operand #1 of %0 = arc.call @Queue_arc_5_split_0(%arg0, %arg1) : (i4, i1) -> i4
  - Operand #0 of %0 = arc.call @Queue_arc_5_split_0(%arg0, %arg1) : (i4, i1) -> i4
  - Candidate "Queue_arc_5_split_4_1"
```
